context: Tests whether the agent correctly uses the ElevenLabs Python SDK for multilingual TTS, including proper imports, model selection for multilingual support, request stitching for seamless multi-chunk audio, and language code enforcement.

checklist.name: Python client import
checklist.description: Imports ElevenLabs from elevenlabs.client (i.e., 'from elevenlabs.client import ElevenLabs'), not from 'elevenlabs' directly

checklist.name: Multilingual model
checklist.description: Uses a model that supports multiple languages (eleven_multilingual_v2, eleven_v3, eleven_flash_v2_5, or eleven_turbo_v2_5) -- NOT eleven_flash_v2 which is English-only

checklist.name: Language code parameter
checklist.description: Passes language_code parameter with an ISO 639-1 code (e.g. 'fr', 'es') for non-English segments

checklist.name: Request stitching - previous_text
checklist.description: Uses previous_text parameter when generating continuation chunks (not the first chunk in a segment)

checklist.name: Request stitching - next_text
checklist.description: Uses next_text parameter when generating chunks that have a following chunk (not the last chunk in a segment)

checklist.name: Valid voice ID
checklist.description: Uses one of the documented voice IDs: JBFqnCBsd6RMkjVDRZzb, EXAVITQu4vr4xnSDxMaL, onwK4e9ZLuTAKqWW03F9, or XB0fDUnXU5powFXDhCwa

checklist.name: Iterates audio chunks
checklist.description: Writes audio output by iterating over the returned chunks (e.g. 'for chunk in audio: f.write(chunk)') rather than writing the response directly

checklist.name: Error handling
checklist.description: Wraps API calls in try/except blocks to handle exceptions

checklist.name: ELEVENLABS_API_KEY env var
checklist.description: README or script references ELEVENLABS_API_KEY as the environment variable for the API key

checklist.name: No deprecated package
checklist.description: Does NOT import from or reference installing the deprecated 'elevenlabs' JS package (if any JS is present, uses @elevenlabs/elevenlabs-js)
